summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AnyWork homepage category redesign. All 6 main category groups (Home Services, Vehicle Services, Personal Services, Business Support, Digital Services, Events & Staffing) are working correctly. Category modals, subcategory navigation, grouped dropdowns, and mobile fixed button all functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Backend API - Categories endpoint returns 6 groups and 49 subcategories
Backend API - Category groups endpoint working correctly
Frontend - Landing page displays 6 main category cards correctly
Frontend - Category cards open subcategory modals with correct services
Frontend - Subcategory modal contains 'Become a helper' CTA
Frontend - Subcategory selection navigates to browse page with category filter
Frontend - Fixed 'Post a Job' button visible on mobile viewport
Frontend - Search bar and postcode input functionality working
Frontend - Post Job page shows grouped categories in dropdown (6 groups found)
Frontend - Post Job multi-step form progression working correctly
Frontend - Become Helper page shows grouped categories for skill selection
Frontend - Become Helper category selection from different groups working
Frontend - Become Helper multi-step form flow working correctly
Frontend - Browse Helpers page category filter dropdown working
Frontend - Browse page search functionality working
Frontend - Browse page view mode toggles (list/map) working
Frontend - Helper cards display and navigation working
Frontend - Category filtering shows correct helper count
